# ClassicWrench - Complete Classic Car Mechanics Directory

> ClassicWrench is the most comprehensive directory of classic car mechanics and restoration shops in America.
> We list 46 shops across 38 states.

## All Shops

- Singer Vehicle Design — Los Angeles, CA
- Gunther Werks — Huntington Beach, CA
- RSR Motors — San Diego, CA
- Patrick Motorsports — El Segundo, CA
- Icon 4x4 — Chatsworth, CA
- Classic Car Studio — Austin, TX
- Texas Classic Cars — Houston, TX
- Motorsport Ranch Classics — Dallas, TX
- Perfectly Vintage — Miami, FL
- Sunshine State Classics — Tampa, FL
- Motor City Muscle — Detroit, MI
- Woodward Classics — Royal Oak, MI
- Liberty Classics — Philadelphia, PA
- Manhattan Motors Classic — Long Island City, NY
- Cascade Classics — Portland, OR
- Rocky Mountain Restoration — Denver, CO
- Emerald City Classics — Seattle, WA
- Desert Classic Motors — Scottsdale, AZ
- Peach State Classics — Atlanta, GA
- Windy City Classics — Chicago, IL
- Commonwealth Classics — Boston, MA
- Buckeye Classics — Columbus, OH
- Old Dominion Classics — Richmond, VA
- Tar Heel Classics — Charlotte, NC
- Music City Motors — Nashville, TN
- Silver State Classics — Las Vegas, NV
- Land of Enchantment Classics — Albuquerque, NM
- Wasatch Classics — Salt Lake City, UT
- Constitution State Classics — Hartford, CT
- Badger State Classics — Milwaukee, WI
- North Star Classics — Minneapolis, MN
- Hoosier Classics — Indianapolis, IN
- Show Me Classics — St. Louis, MO
- Hawkeye Classics — Des Moines, IA
- Sunflower State Classics — Wichita, KS
- Cornhusker Classics — Omaha, NE
- Palmetto State Classics — Charleston, SC
- Heart of Dixie Classics — Birmingham, AL
- Natural State Classics — Little Rock, AR
- First State Classics — Wilmington, DE
- Aloha State Classics — Honolulu, HI
- Gem State Classics — Boise, ID
- Pelican State Classics — New Orleans, LA
- Pine Tree State Classics — Portland, ME
- Big Sky Classics — Billings, MT
- Sooner State Classics — Oklahoma City, OK

## Services
Full Restoration, Engine Rebuild, Paint & Body, Upholstery, Parts Sourcing, Electrical, Transmission, Brake Systems, Suspension, Chrome & Trim

## Specialties
Porsche, Ferrari, Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Jaguar, Muscle Cars, British Sports Cars, Pre-War, Hot Rods, Corvette, Ford, Chevrolet
